title: Polydex2REI
description: An REI attachment, used for bridging Polymer to REI
body:
# Polydex2REI

**Bridging the Gap Between Polymer and REI — Let Your Recipes Be Seen**

## 📦 What is Polydex2REI?

**Polydex2REI** is a **compatibility addon** that connects [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) and [REI (Roughly Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), enabling full support for **virtual items** and **custom recipes** defined by [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex).

By default, REI cannot recognize Polymer’s **server-side virtual items**, leading to missing entries in recipe viewers and item lookups. Polydex2REI fixes that.

## 🔧 Features

- 📘 **Supports custom recipes** registered via the Polydex API
- 🔄 **Synchronizes item lookup actions** — clicking or keypress correctly opens the recipe page
- 💡 Works with **both server-side and client-side virtual items**
- 🌐 **Requires both sides installed** to function properly

## ❓ Why Use It?

If you're a modpack creator or developer using Polymer to register virtual items (e.g. recipe placeholders, guide items, UI buttons), you’ve likely run into the issue: **REI can’t find them.** This addon solves that cleanly — **no extra setup, just plug and play**.

## 🧩 Requirements

- [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)
- [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex)
- [Packet-Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)
- Must be installed on **both client and server**
